tagline: REALTOR® · Keller Williams Frisco · DFW Buyers, Sellers & Investors

brokerage.name: Keller Williams Realty (example brokerage)
brokerage.disclaimer: Each Office Independently Owned and Operated. Demo site — fictional agent shown under KW-style compliance pattern.

faq.q: Do I need to be pre-approved before we start looking?
faq.a: Not to start conversations, but yes before we tour homes seriously. I can connect you with trusted lenders in DFW who can get you pre-approved quickly — often same day.

faq.q: How do you price a home for sale?
faq.a: I use AI-powered comparable sales analysis — recent closings, active competition, days on market, and neighborhood trends. No guessing. I'll show you the data and we set a price together.

faq.q: How fast do your listings typically sell?
faq.a: My average is 9 days on market vs. the DFW average of 28 days. AI-optimized pricing, professional photography, and targeted marketing make the difference.

faq.q: Do you work with buyers relocating to DFW from out of state?
faq.a: Yes — a significant part of my business is relocation. I do virtual tours, video walkthroughs, school district breakdowns, and can coordinate remote closings.

faq.q: What areas of DFW do you cover?
faq.a: Frisco, Plano, McKinney, Allen, Prosper, Celina, and surrounding communities. I'm most active in Collin County and the north Dallas suburbs.

pageTitle: Morgan Ellis, REALTOR® — Frisco TX | Keller Williams
metaDescription: Frisco REALTOR® with Keller Williams. AI-powered home search, CMA reports, and expert representation for buyers, sellers & investors in DFW. 4.9★ from 87 reviews.
heroSubtitle: AI-powered market insights, white-glove service, and honest advice. Buying, selling, or investing in DFW.
